external_services.service_name: Review and Approval of Barangay Disbursement Vouchers
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Review and Approval of Barangay Disbursement Vouchers

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Disbursement Vouchers and supporting documents – 1 original and 2 photocopies

steps.client_step: 1. Submit complete requirements to the City Accounting Office – Barangay Division for review and approval
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Receive and check submitted documents for completeness and acknowledge receipt
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant III (Lipa City Accounting Office)

steps.agency_action: 1.2. Conduct pre-audit of documents: a. If with incomplete information, return to the bearer; b. If with complete information, sign as preparer and as approver in the Disbursement Voucher
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide VI, Accountant III (Lipa City Accounting Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Claim the Disbursement Voucher and supporting documents
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant III (Lipa City Accounting Office)
